verses.text: Tua ahih manin i zaksa thuman thutakte i khahsuahkhak lohna dingin kiptak khotakin i letkip ding kisam hi
Vantung mite in hong gen thute thuman hi a, tua thu a palsatte in a kilawm bangin gim thuak ding uh hi

Tua ahih manin a thupi mahmah hih hotkhiatna thudon loin i om leh suahtakna om thei ngeilo ding hi. A masa-in Topa mahmah in hotkhiatna thu hong pulak a, tua thu a za mite in thuman ahihna thu eite tungah hong gen leuleu uh hi
Amaute' thugenna banah Pasian in vangliatna lim, leh na lamdang a tuamtuamte bawlna tawh hong genbeh lai hi. Tua banah ama hoihsak bangin Pasian in Kha Siangtho zong hong hawm lai hi.
Eite in genbelin i neih a hong tungding leitung pen Pasian in vantung mite' khutsungah koihlo hi
Lai Siangtho mun khatah a kigenna-ah, “Pasian aw, nangma ngaihsut tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, na phawk tham dingin mihing' ta bang hi lel ahi hiam
Ahi zongin vantung mite sangin a neuzaw deuhin na bawl a, minthan'na leh pahtawina na guan' a
na khempeuh na uk sak hi,” na ci hi. “Pasian in na khempeuh a uk dingin bawl,” a cih ciangin na khempeuh a huamkhin hita hi. Mihing in na khempeuh a uklam i thei nai kei hi

Ahi zongin Pasian' hehpihna hangin mi khempeuh-a' dingin Jesuh a sih theihna dingin tawlkhat sung vantung mite sangin a neuzaw-in a kibawlna i mu a, sihna a thuakna hangin minthan'na leh pahtawina a ngahna thu i thei hi
Na khempeuh ama-a' dingin a piangsak Pasian in tate tampi minthan'na a ngahsak theihna dingin a thuakna tawh hotkhiatna thu-ah a makai dingin Jesuh a bawl ding a kilawm mah ahi hi
Mawhna panin mite a siangthosakpa leh sian'thosakna a ngah mite in, Pa, a kibang a neikhawm uh hi. Tua hi a, Jesuh in mite, “Sanggam,” a cih ding zum ngaihsutlo ahih manin
“Pasian aw, ka sanggamte kiangah nangma thu ka gen ding a, mi khempeuh mai-ah nangmah ka hong phat ding hi,” na ci a
tua ciangin, “Pasian muan'in ka nei ding hi,” na ci kik a, tua ciangin, “Pasian in hong piak ta dangte tawh hih lai-ah ka om hi,” na ci leuleu hi
Tate a cih mite pen leitung cilesa a nei mite ahih manin, ama sihna hangin sihna a uk Dawimangpa a sukgawp theihna dingin Jesuh in mihing pian'zia mah hong nei phot hi
Tua ahih manin sihna a kihtak manin sal bangin a om mite amah in hong suaktasak hi
Ama lunghihmawh pen vantung mite hilo a, Abraham' suanlekhakte a lunghimawh ahihna thu hong kitel hi

Tua ahih manin mihingte' mawhna a kimaisak theihna dingin Pasian' na a sepna-ah mite-a' dingin hehpihna leh cihtakna tawh Siampi Lianpen a suahtheihna dingin a sanggamte tawh a kibangin mihing lim a hong puakding a kisam ahi hi
Ama pumpi mahmah in ze-etna leh gimna thuak ahih manin tuhun ciangin tua bang a thuakte a hong huhthei hi.
